creator: christer.solskogen@gmail.com
text:
Unable to install wireshark-lite

/bin/sh ../../libtool --tag=CC   --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -I./../.. -I./.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/include  '-DPLUGIN_DIR="/usr/local/lib/wireshark/plugins/1.0.4"'  -DINET6 -D_U_="__attribute__((unused))" -O2 -pipe -funit-at-a-time -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -W -Wdeclaration-after-statement -Wendif-labels -Wpointer-arith -Wno-pointer-sign -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/glib12 -I/usr/include  -MT packet-inap.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/packet-inap.Tpo -c -o packet-inap.lo packet-inap.c
 cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -I./../.. -I./.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/include -DPLUGIN_DIR=\"/usr/local/lib/wireshark/plugins/1.0.4\" -DINET6 "-D_U_=__attribute__((unused))" -O2 -pipe -funit-at-a-time -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -W -Wdeclaration-after-statement -Wendif-labels -Wpointer-arith -Wno-pointer-sign -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/glib12 -I/usr/include -MT packet-inap.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/packet-inap.Tpo -c packet-inap.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/packet-inap.o
cc: packet-inap.c: No such file or directory
cc: No input files specified
gmake[4]: *** [packet-inap.lo] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/usr/ports/net/wireshark-lite/work/wireshark-1.0.4/epan/dissectors'
gmake[3]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/usr/ports/net/wireshark-lite/work/wireshark-1.0.4/epan/dissectors'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/usr/ports/net/wireshark-lite/work/wireshark-1.0.4/epan'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/var/tmp/usr/ports/net/wireshark-lite/work/wireshark-1.0.4'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/wireshark-lite.

How-To-Repeat: install net/wireshark-lite
